basic_details.job_title: ESIC Medical College and Hospital Jaipur Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 33 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ESIC Medical College and Hospital Jaipur
basic_details.short_information: The latest ESIC Medical College and Hospital Jaipur (ESIC Jaipur) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Senior Resident posts! Published at esic.gov.in, this new recruitment drive offers 33 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum age of 45 years and possessing a PG/DNB/Diploma in the concerned specialty from a recognized university, registered in MCI or State Medical Council (Rajasthan) can attend the walk-in interview on 19 May 2026. Find all details about the ESIC Jaipur Senior Resident 2026 vacancy, including eligibility, walk-in procedure, and notification PDF her

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation as per ESIC rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG/DNB/Diploma in concern Specialty from recognized university, registered in MCI or State Medical Council (Rajasthan).
qualification.details: PG/DNB/Diploma in concern Specialty from recognized university Registered in MCI or State Medical Council (Rajasthan)

salary_details.pay_scale: Basic Pay 67,700/- + allowances as per 7th CPC Level 11
salary_details.details: Basic Pay: 67,700/- Allowances: As per 7th CPC Level 11, including NPA@20% (wherever applicable & admissible), DA@60%, HRA@20%, TA@7200.

selection_process: Walk-in-Interview Verification of documents Minimum 50% marks in interview is compulsory for selection

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates must attend the interview on 19th May 2026 with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PG/DNB/Diploma in the concerned specialty from a recognized university and be registered with the MCI or State Medical Council (Rajasthan).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Senior Resident posts is 45 years, with age relaxation applicable as per ESIC rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Basic Pay 67,700/- with allowances as per 7th CPC Level 11, including NPA, DA, HRA, and TA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: You need to appear for a walk-in interview on 19th May 2026 at ESIC Medical College and Hospital Jaipur with all original documents and photocopies.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The application fee is NIL for SC/ST/PWD, Female candidates & Ex-servicemen. For all other categories, the fee is ₹225.00 through Demand Draft.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ESIC Medical College and Hospital Jaipur.

faq.question: Q8. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested Xerox copies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and registration certificates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any experience required for these posts?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention any specific experience requirement beyond the educational qualifications. Please refer to the official notification for complete details.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 33 vacancies for Senior Resident posts across various specialities.
